AddIpAddressesToTheIpAddressGroup.ipSetId: The ID of the IP address group
AddIpAddressesToTheIpAddressGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddIpAddressesToTheIpAddressGroup.ipAddressInfo: Information of the IP addresses to be added. The ipVersion must be consistent with the specified IP address group. A maximum of 10 entries can be specified per request
AddIpAddressesToTheIpAddressGroup.ipAddressInfo.ipAddress: IP address in the parameter template, which can be a specific IP address or a CIDR block
AddIpAddressesToTheIpAddressGroup.ipAddressInfo.description: Description of the IP address entry in the parameter template
